data.name: Hentai World Love
data.detailed_description:
Hentai World Love is an easy-to-play arcade-style game where you match similar images. Dive into hours of fun by connecting pictures of beautiful girls. Sharpen your skills as you match and link identical tiles, progressing through levels as you play. There’s no time limit, no score pressure—just pure relaxing tile-matching fun.

Features : 

Fast-paced arcade-style tile matching gameplay.

Two modes: Normal and Hard.

Calm, soothing background music.

Hentai World Love offers entertaining puzzles with light challenges and brain teasers. Match, connect, and enjoy endless fun with charming visuals as you climb toward victory!

data.short_description: Hentai World Love is a relaxing, arcade-style matching game where you connect images of beautiful girls. No timer or score—just fun, skill-based gameplay with progressive levels and charming visuals.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 捷克文*, 荷蘭文*, 希臘文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
